skill_availability_goal: Verify that feature-implementor checks design deliverables before planning frontend UI changes and blocks when design inputs are missing or conflicting.
prompt: docs/pm/customer-portal/profile-settings/PRD.md 和 docs/engineer/customer-portal/profile-settings/TRD.md 已确认。请进入 feature-implementor，更新设置页前端 UI 的信息层级和主按钮样式；当前 workspace 没有 docs/design/customer-portal/profile-settings/ui-ux-spec.md 或 visual-system.md。先不要改代码。
